untranslatable_reason: Elliott Wave Oscillator (EWO) is not in the allowed indicators list. MACD histogram was used as a proxy for oscillator-type momentum, but this is not a true EWO implementation. The 'new high for period n' condition cannot be accurately translated without access to rolling period-based high detection logic or the explicit EWO indicator. Parameter 'period_n_lookback' is marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no default value provided.
translation_notes: Signal requires Elliott Wave Oscillator which is not available. Substituted MACD histogram as a momentum oscillator proxy: entry when histogram makes a new high (crosses above previous value) OR when histogram is negative. Exit when histogram turns negative. This is a compromise translation and does not accurately represent the original EWO-based signal. Recommend obtaining or calculating true EWO (typically: EMA5(high+low/2) - EMA35(high+low/2)) for proper implementation.
